mapper.insert: insert into im_room(room_id, name, last_seq) values (#{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{name}, 0)
mapper.select: select last_seq from im_room where room_id = #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY} for update
mapper.update: update im_room set last_seq = #{lastSeq}, updated_at = current_timestamp where room_id = #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY}
